references.borrowed: primary reassurance panel, what happens next, and reference-friendly confirmation grammar
references.rejected: a single green success treatment for every state before confirmation is authoritative

references.borrowed: summary-list readability and explicit return/change discipline
references.rejected: turning the hub ledger into a check-answers clone

references.borrowed: responsive embed-safe patient route discipline and suppressed browser chrome in NHS App host mode
references.rejected: assuming browser-only affordances or detached artifact navigation

references.borrowed: modal semantics for structured manual proof review
references.rejected: non-modal proof overlays that leave background content interactive

references.borrowed: button-led disclosure semantics for the continuity evidence drawer
focus-visible reserve handling for sticky trays and drawers
references.rejected: allowing sticky chrome to hide focused controls

references.borrowed: single-column fallbacks for evidence and confirmation regions on narrow widths
references.rejected: two-dimensional scrolling for ordinary evidence rows

references.borrowed: bounded live-region usage for follow-on announcements without moving focus
references.rejected: toast-only status changes with no programmatic status semantics

references.borrowed: user-visible assertions and isolated route setup
accessibility-tree capture for the hub pane, modal, and patient route
deterministic screenshot capture as supporting proof
references.rejected: uncontrolled visual baselines tied to volatile content

references.borrowed: dense but aligned professional hierarchy for multi-panel work
references.rejected: ornamental gradients or chrome-heavy control bars

references.borrowed: consistent action placement and repeatable task grammar
references.rejected: multiple unrelated ways to trigger the same confirmation state change
